items.name: Vintage 2000s Gyaru McBling Grunge Bag Brown
items.description:
This piece comes in multiple colorways, check them out!
https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611/Laveys-CoutureElevate your style with this vintage 2000s belt bag, a standout piece that blends Gyaru, McBling, and grunge aesthetics. Crafted with rich brown leather sides and a striking vintage dark orange leather centerpiece, this design is accented with bold panels for a wild edge. Metallic spikes along the sides and sparkling faux diamond embellishments add a perfect mix of grit and glam. This bag is the ultimate accessory to showcase your unapologetic Punk Y2K-inspired fashion.
